title: HOOK — playground arrival
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot at @playground-park — sunny tree-shaded green park, mulch ground, wooden tower-house playground with tube slide softly visible BACKGROUND-RIGHT, swing-set softly visible BACKGROUND-LEFT, soft warm afternoon light. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME standing on the mulch ground with both feet planted on the mulch, warm crinkled-eye dad-smile, both hands relaxed at his sides. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the mulch right beside Papa with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, beaming with cheerful excited kid energy, both hands softly clasped at her chest. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the mulch right beside Papa with both feet planted, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, beaming with cheerful excited kid energy, both hands softly clasped at her chest. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. The mulch ground stays plain clean throughout — no marks, no debris, no other people on the playground. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) All three look out at the playground with cheerful warm smiles. Papa (warm cheerful dad-voice): "Welcome to the play-PARK!" Sara (cheerful kid-voice, beaming): "PLAYGROUND DAY!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva (cheerful giggle, hands still clasped at chest): "Slide! Swings! Tree-house!" Papa (warm chuckle, eyes crinkled): "First one to the slide!" Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays grounded with both feet on the mulch throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The mulch and playground stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
